ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the college or university */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, community college) */,
  "school_size" TEXT /* Size of the school (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "athletic_director" TEXT /* Name of the athletic director */,
  "athletic_department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the athletic department */,
  "athletic_department_email" TEXT /* Email address of the athletic department */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the school is part of */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the school belongs to within the conference */,
  "rival_school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rival school, if any */,
  "ncaa_division" TEXT /* NCAA division the school is part of (e.g., FBS, FCS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_rival_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("rival_school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_type" TEXT /* Type of conference (e.g., NCAA Division I, NCAA Division II, NCAA Division III) */,
  "conference_commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  "conference_office_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the conference office */,
  "conference_office_email" TEXT /* Email address of the conference office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference this division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rivalries" (
  "rivalry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rivalry */,
  "rivalry_name" TEXT /* Name of the rivalry */,
  "rivalry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the rivalry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of one school in the rivalry */,
  "rival_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rival school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivalry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_rival_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("rival_school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ncaa_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NCAA division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the NCAA division (e.g., FBS, FCS) */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the NCAA division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "school_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school performance entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the performance (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_standings" (
  "conference_standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference standings entry */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the standings (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_standings_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_standings_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisional_rankings" (
  "divisional_rankings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each divisional rankings entry */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the rankings (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the school in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("divisional_rankings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisional_rankings_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisional_rankings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)
